अनु榀ात छूट िन玈िलिखत सारणी म犆 यथािविन琖द玗 牱प म犆 होगी, अथा榁त्: — — — —- सारणी सारणी सारणी सारणी िस猳े का अं琈कत मू瀖य मानक वजन अनु榀ात छूट संरचना म犆 मानक वजन म犆 (1) (2) (3) (4) पांच सौ 牲पये 35 灡ाम चांदी म犆 1/500वां जोड़ कर या घटा कर अथा榁त् चाँदी म犆 灹ित 1000 म犆 498 से 502 तक का अंतर हो सकेगा । 1/100वां जोड़ कर या घटा कर अथा榁त वजन म犆 34.65 灡ाम से 35.35 灡ाम तक का अंतर हो सकता है । दस 牲पये 7.71 灡ाम (बा琅 वलय 4.45 灡ाम और म瀇य भाग 3.26 灡ाम) बा琅 वलय- (ए瀖युिमिनयम- कांसा) ए瀖युिमिनयम- 5.5 灹ितशत से 6 灹ितशत, िनकल- 1.75 灹ितशत से 2 灹ितशत और शेष तांबा है। म瀇य भाग- (कू灹ो- िनकल) तांबा और िनकल दोन犘 के िलए 1 灹ितशत जोड़ कर या घटा कर अथा榁त् तांबे म犆 74 灹ितशत से 76 灹ितशत और िनकल म犆 24 灹ितशत से 26 灹ितशत का अंतर हो सकता है। 2.5 灹ितशत जोड़ कर या घटा कर अथा榁त् वजन म犆 7.52 灡ाम से 7.90 灡ाम का अंतर हो सकता है। [एफ. सं. 02/26/2015-िस猳ा] पंकज गु玅ा, अवर सिचव (एस.पी.एम.सी. और िस猳ा) MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economics Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 27th January, 2016 G.S.R. 116(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by clauses (d) and (e) of Sub-section (2) of section 24 of the Coinage Act, 2011(11 of 2011), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, namely:— -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] 1. Short title and commencement:- (1) These rules may be called the Coinage of Five Hundred Rupees and Ten Rupees Coins to commemorate the occasion of “500TH ANNIVERSARY OF SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU’S COMING TO VRINDAVAN” Rules, 2016. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. Denomination of coins:- The coins of the following denominations shall also be coined at the Mint for issue under the authority of the Central Government to commemorate the occasion of “500TH ANNIVERSARY OF SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU’S COMING TO VRINDAVAN”, namely:— 1. Five Hundred Rupees; 2. Ten Rupees. 3. Dimension and composition of coins: - The coins of the denominations mentioned in rule 2 shall conform to the following dimensions and composition, namely: — 4. Design:- The design of the coins shall be as under: — — — —- (i) FIVE HUNDRED RUPEES OBVERSE: The face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capital of Ashoka Pillar in the center with the legend “सयमेवजयते” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word “भारत” in Devanagri script and on the right periphery flanked with the word “INDIA” in English and it shall also bear the Rupee symbol “`” and denominational value “500” in the international numerals below the Lion Capital. REVERSE: The face of coin shall bear the image of “SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU” in the center, with inscription “ी कृण चैतय महाभु के वृंदावन आगमन क# ५००वीं जयंती” in Devanagri script on upper periphery and “500TH ANNIVERSARY OF SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU’S COMING TO VRINDAVAN” in English on the lower periphery respectively. The Denomination of coin Shape and outside diameter Number of serrations Metal composition (1) (2) (3) (4) Five Hundred Rupees Circular 44 millimeters 200 Quaternary Alloy Silver - 50 per cent Copper -40 per cent Nickel - 05 per cent Zinc - 05 per cent Ten Rupees Circular 27 millimeters (Bi-metallic) --- Outer Ring (Aluminium Bronze) Copper - 92 per cent Aluminium -06 per cent Nickel -02 per cent Center piece (Cupro Nickel) Copper - 75 per cent Nickel - 25 per cent -- 4 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3 (i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 year’s figure “२०१५” shall be written in Devanagri on left side of the picture of SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU and “2015” in English on the right side respectively. (ii) TEN RUPEES OBVERSE: The face of the coin shall bear the Lion Capitol of Ashoka Pillar in the center with the legend “स*यमेवजयते” inscribed below, flanked on the left periphery with the word “भारत” in Devanagri script and on the right periphery flanked with the word “INDIA” in English and it shall also bear the Rupee symbol “`” and denominational value “10” in the international numerals below the Lion Capital. REVERSE: The face of coin shall bear the picture of “SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU” in the center, with inscription “ी कृण चैतय महाभु के वृंदावन आगमन क# ५००वीं जयंती” in Devanagri script on upper periphery and “500TH ANNIVERSARY OF SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU’S COMING TO VRINDAVAN” in English on the lower periphery respectively. The year’s figure “२०१५” shall be written in Devanagri on left side of the picture of SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU and “2015” in English on the right side respectively. 4. Standard weight and remedy allowed:- The standard weight of the coins of the following denominations, coined to commemorate the occasion of “500TH ANNIVERSARY OF SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA MAHAPRABHU’S COMING TO VRINDAVAN” and the remedy allowed in making of such coins shall be as specified in the Table below: — — — —- TABLE Denomination of coin Standard weight Remedy allowed In composition In standard weight (1) (2) (3) (4) Five Hundred Rupees 35 Grams 1/500th plus or minus for Silver, that is to say, the Silver content may vary from 498 to 502 per 1000. 1/100th plus or minus, that is to say, weight could vary from 34.65 grams to 35.35 grams. Ten Rupees 7.71 Grams (outer ring 4.45 grams and center piece 3.26 grams) Outer Ring – (Aluminium – Bronze) Aluminium 5.5 per cent. to 6 per cent; Nickel- 1.75 per cent. to 2 per cent. and remainder are copper. Centre piece – (Cupro- Nickel) Plus or minus 1 per cent. for both Copper and Nickel, that is to say, the copper may vary from 74 per cent. to 76 per cent. and Nickel from 24 per cent. to 26 per cent. Plus or minus 2.5 per cent. that is to say, the weight could vary from 7.52 grams to 7.90 grams. [F. No. 02/26/2015-Coin] PANKAJ GUPTA, Under Secy.
